metahealth.title: What is Meta-Health?
paragraphs: Meta-Health teaches that illness is never random—it is always a reflection of an internal conflict between the mind and body. When a person experiences disease, it is often the result of a specific unresolved emotional disturbance. These symptoms act as messages from the body, pointing us toward what needs healing within.

There is something invisible within us—our thoughts and emotions—that has the power to trigger a specific biological response in the body. Every emotion we experience sends a signal through the nervous system, and over time, unresolved emotional patterns can manifest as physical symptoms.

In a healthy emotional state, when we feel something, we naturally do one of two things: either we fully experience and release that feeling, or we let it pass on its own. This process is similar to breathing: feeling emotions is like inhaling, and letting go is like exhaling. It is a natural, continuous cycle that keeps us in balance.

But sometimes, we unconsciously hold on to emotions, unable to process or release them. These suppressed emotions can settle anywhere in the body, disrupting its natural energy flow. Since our bodies are made of vibrational energy, trapped emotions disturb that natural vibration, eventually leading to physical symptoms and illness.

luscher.title: The Lüscher Color Test
paragraphs: The Lüscher Color Test is a psychological tool developed over 70 years ago by Dr. Max Lüscher—a Swiss doctor, psychotherapist, university professor, psychologist, psychiatrist, and an author. Lüscher's innovative approach uses color selection as a gateway into the emotional world, bypassing the need for direct questioning and allowing clients to reveal their inner states naturally through their color preferences.

What makes Dr. Lüscher's work so groundbreaking is the level of psychological depth he encoded into the color test templates. It explores a complex network of human emotions, including: overall mood, conscious emotions, expected behaviors, personality traits, emotions toward relationships, self-perception, feelings toward responsibilities and tasks, and emotional outlook on the future.
The test also pinpoints areas of tension in daily life, reveals hidden sources of frustration, highlights coping strategies, and offers powerful insight into the motivations behind behavior.

hero.title: Asmaa Mohammed Salem
hero.subtitle: Specialised Life Coach – Using the Lüscher Color Test and Meta-Health Approach
hero.quote: Your remedy is within you, yet you do not sense it… and your illness comes from you, yet you do not see it.

paragraphs: Throughout my professional and personal journey, I've been committed to expanding my knowledge and developing a diverse skill set that bridges management, psychotherapy, and personal development. Below are the key certifications and accredited courses I've completed in support of my vision to empower individuals and help them achieve balance in their lives.

credentials.title: Bachelor's Degree in Computer Science
credentials.description: Foundational degree in computer science providing a strong analytical and technical background.

credentials.title: Certified Project Management Professional (PMP)
credentials.description: Professional certification in project management from the globally recognized Project Management Institute.

credentials.title: Lüscher Color Diagnostic Test Certification
credentials.description: The Lüscher Color Diagnostic Test goes beyond traditional questioning methods, offering a precise and profound exploration of a client's emotional world. It identifies stress sources and illuminates emotions across various life dimensions, guiding individuals toward self-awareness and emotional balance.

credentials.title: Master's Degree – Meta-Health & Color Therapy
credentials.description: Diagnosing using Color Therapy and Application of Organic and Psychological Meta-Health.

credentials.title: Master's Degree – Holistic Healing by Color Therapy
credentials.description: Specialized studies focused on holistic healing through color therapy methodologies.

credentials.title: Life Coach Diploma
credentials.description: Mental Health & Wellness specialization, providing professional coaching skills for supporting individuals on their personal development journeys.

careerStory.title: Why did I choose to shift from Project Management to Meta-Health and Emotional Science?
paragraphs: In truth, there isn't a vast difference between the two paths. In project management, I was overseeing external projects in the outer world. Now, I guide the management of thoughts and emotions within the inner world of the human being. While both involve elements of structure and direction, I came to realize that managing emotions and thoughts—along with understanding the intricate mind-body mechanisms behind them—has a far deeper impact on my own life and the lives of those around me.

Lifelong learning is a cornerstone of my journey. I believe that knowledge has no ceiling and no age limit. This continuous exploration has become a rewarding and joyful path for me—one I hope brings the same value and inspiration to those who choose to walk it with me.

hero.title: Lüscher Support Platform
hero.description: A smart platform that takes the hassle out of Lüscher Test analysis… Try it and save hours of effort in just minutes!

instructors.intro: This platform automates Lüscher Color Test analysis, drawing from Lüscher's official books, my training at Manage the Now Academy (MTN), and the Arab Academy of Behavioral Sciences.

phases.title: Phase One
phases.subtitle: Data Entry
phases.description: You will receive a custom-designed Google Form to collect essential client data—such as name, age, and gender—along with their color selections based on the official test protocol. This form enables accurate and organized data gathering without any manual intervention, saving time and effort during the input and processing stages.

phases.title: Phase Two
phases.subtitle: Lüscher Test Sheet
phases.description: Once data entry is complete via the form, the platform automatically processes the data according to the approved Lüscher test rules.

subItems.title: Page One: Basic Lüscher Sheet – Official Lüscher Institute Protocol
subItems.description: Contains all codes resulting from the color arrangement, with matching and differing codes highlighted, psychological tension points analyzed by code weight, plus masculine and feminine state indicators.

subItems.title: Page Two: Advanced Lüscher Test – Manage the Now Academy Protocol
subItems.description: An advanced page beyond the basic sheet, containing the same codes plus additional distinctive codes, each representing a unique psychological meaning.

phases.title: Phase Three
phases.subtitle: Individual Color Analysis
phases.description: For maximum clarity and professionalism, each color in the test is given its own dedicated page covering psychological meanings, acceptance and rejection dimensions, conscious and unconscious needs, and stress impact. Content is drawn from four verified reference sources.

phases.title: Phase Four
phases.subtitle: Comprehensive Report
phases.description: Because the platform’s goal is not only to display results but to support the practitioner in delivering added value to the client, a comprehensive and detailed report is generated—including the overall psychological state, key stress points, psychological needs, emotional conditions, and treatment suggestions per color. Downloadable and printable for client delivery.
